raw.reasoning: These comments point to concrete behavior mismatches or cheap hardening improvements; the remaining noise is static-analysis around intentional cursor persistence.

retrospective.summary: Triaged PR review comments for OpenClaw poll fallback, fixed the real gateway bugs, aligned the docs, and added regression coverage for RECOVERING_WS and 429 backoff behavior.
